checks.finding: No issues found. T-002/T-003/T-004/T-007/T-008 (Risk: medium) touch new generation logic, additive reviewer-check extensions, and a warn-phase-only script -- none independently meets the high-tier bar (no auth/authz grant, PII, migration, or externally-visible API contract change in their scope).

No Risk: critical tasks exist in this task set, so the second-approver/signed-bundle requirement does not apply.

No issues found. No issues found.
